level.setting: An ancient, submerged temple built into the wall of a deep-sea canyon.

encounters.hazard: Heavy shifting currents that push the player toward jagged rocks.

pickup.name: Solidified Mercury Shard
pickup.effect: Allows the player to manipulate metallic surfaces.

encounters.trigger: Opening the main pressure door alerts the swarm.

encounters.hazard: Decreasing oxygen levels requiring fast combat resolution.

pickup.name: Vibration Resonator
pickup.effect: Amplifies geomantic frequency to shatter crystalline structures.

encounters.trigger: Reading the archive pedestal activates the defense system.

encounters.hazard: Sudden pressure drops causing periodic stuns.

pickup.name: Heart of the Trench
pickup.effect: A glowing gem that vibrates at the frequency of the Abyss Lord's armor.

encounters.trigger: Crossing the bridge causes the floor to collapse into the boss arena.

boss.name: Abyss Lord
boss.victory_condition: Infuse the Heart into the Lord's crystal armor to shatter it.

level.objective: Retrieve the Abyssal Core to restore light to the surface world.
level.reward: The ability to solidify water into platforms for traversal.

level.setting: A quiet, bioluminescent underwater realm filled with marble ruins and vibrant coral life.

pickup.name: Coral Spikes
pickup.effect: Provides a temporary shield of hardened minerals.

encounters.trigger: Approaching the eel causes it to dart towards the hidden Current Gate.

pickup.name: Sonic Resonator
pickup.effect: Emits a low frequency hum that calms aggressive wildlife.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab unlocks the seal to the Abyssal Chamber.

pickup.name: Luminous Pearl
pickup.effect: Increases detection range and reveals structural weak points.

encounters.trigger: Calming the seahorse allows it to guide you to the Abyssal Boss.

boss.name: Ancient Leviathan Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Use the Luminous Pearl to reveal its core and tame it with the Tidal Whip.

level.objective: Restore balance to the underwater sanctuary by calming the guardian.
level.reward: The ability to summon marine mounts and command tides.

level.setting: A decaying, lightless trench floor at the bottom of a forbidden sea.

encounters.hazard: Sinking silt that slows movement speed.

pickup.name: Vial of Corrupted Brine
pickup.effect: Increases necrotic damage against aquatic manifestations.

encounters.trigger: Opening the rusted iron gates triggers the guardian to awaken.

encounters.hazard: High-pressure zones that drain health over time.

pickup.name: Staff of the Abyssal Tide
pickup.effect: Allows the user to manipulate underwater currents to stun enemies.

encounters.trigger: Disturbing the glowing coral path alerts the spectral wraith.

encounters.hazard: Swirling vortexes that throw the player into walls.

pickup.name: Essence of the Ancient Leviathan
pickup.effect: A concentrated catalyst needed to bind the soul of the Deep God.

encounters.trigger: Walking into the ribcage causes the debris to collapse and reform into the golem.

boss.name: The Drowned King of the Abyss
boss.victory_condition: Use the Essence of the Ancient Leviathan to shatter the King's spectral armor, then deliver a final blow with the Bone Scythe.

level.objective: Resurrect the Deep God to reclaim your stolen mortality.
level.reward: The Crown of Tides, granting control over all oceanic spirits.

level.setting: The Abyssal Research Station located on the ocean floor.

pickup.name: Thermal Core
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with high-pressure locks

encounters.trigger: Approaching the rusted bulkhead door

pickup.name: Ionized Salt Battery
pickup.effect: Increases conductivity of electrical attacks

encounters.trigger: Activating the emergency power sequence

pickup.name: Conductive Core Catalyst
pickup.effect: Essential for penetrating ancient metallic shielding

encounters.trigger: Reaching the central reactor console

boss.name: Leviathan Guardian
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Catalyst through the reactor cooling vents to bypass the boss's bio-armor.

level.objective: Deactivate the ancient underwater geothermal reactor before the entire base implodes.
level.reward: The Ocean's Tear artifact, granting permanent storm elemental affinity.

level.setting: An abandoned research station buried beneath the Midnight Zone.

encounters.hazard: High pressure current that pushes the player backward.

pickup.name: Corroded Iron Key
pickup.effect: Used to open the rusted ventilation shaft leading to the boss chamber.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Lurker causes the coral barricade to crumble, revealing the Sunken Vault.

pickup.name: High-Frequency Sonic Emitter
pickup.effect: Temporarily disables protective energy shields.

encounters.trigger: The Sentry explodes, clearing the debris from the sunken laboratory entrance.

pickup.name: Ancient Power Core
pickup.effect: Essential component to stabilize the boss's unstable armor shielding.

encounters.trigger: The Horror retreats behind the final blast door, requiring the player to activate the emergency purge.

boss.name: Leviathan Prime
boss.victory_condition: Insert the core into the boss's mainframe while shields are lowered by the Sonic Emitter.

level.objective: Retrieve the Abyssal Core from the deepest trench ruins.
level.reward: The Blade of the Abyss, granting permanent invisibility while submerged.

level.setting: An unstable, deep-sea research station located at the bottom of the Mariana Trench.

enemy.name: Pressure-Hardened Crab
enemy.weakness: Heat-infused thermal shock from the Pyromancer Flame

pickup.name: Superheated Core
pickup.effect: Increases elemental temperature threshold for aquatic combat

encounters.trigger: Defeating the crab releases a pressurized gas bubble that blows open the rusted bunker gate.

enemy.name: Mutated Eel
enemy.weakness: The Superheated Core from the bunker

pickup.name: Conductive Gel
pickup.effect: Allows thermal energy to travel through salt water

encounters.trigger: Killing the eel causes it to spasm into the reactor controls, initiating the final lockdown.

enemy.name: Corroded Mech-Guardian
enemy.weakness: Conductive Gel applied to the Pyromancer Flame

pickup.name: Deep-Sea Catalyst
pickup.effect: Ignites water on contact for massive damage

encounters.trigger: Destroying the guardian disables the energy barrier surrounding the boss arena.

boss.name: The Leviathan Hydra
boss.weakness: The Deep-Sea Catalyst combined with the Pyromancer Flame
boss.victory_condition: Ignite the creature's bioluminescent heart to force a retreat.

level.objective: Escape the imploding research facility before the deep-sea pressure crushes the dome.

pickup.name: Thermal Battery
pickup.effect: Provides heat energy for high-intensity weapon output.

encounters.trigger: Opening the airlock releases the pressure needed to engage the boss's security perimeter.

pickup.name: Superconducting Coil
pickup.effect: Increases electrical conductivity for weapon strikes.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the sentry overrides the station's lockdown protocols.

pickup.name: Final Override Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the coolant systems to destabilize the boss core.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the eel draws the Boss out from the shadows.

boss.name: Leviathan Prime
boss.victory_condition: Use the Final Override Key to expose the core then strike with the Harpoon Launcher.

level.objective: Restore power to the Warden's base and escape the trench.
level.reward: The Warden's Honor Badge and full facility control.

level.setting: A vibrant, magical reef kingdom beneath the ocean surface.

encounters.hazard: Slow-moving bubble currents that push the player backwards

pickup.name: Mirror Shard
pickup.effect: Reflects projectile attacks

encounters.trigger: Defeating the jellyfish releases a stream of light that illuminates the path to the Coral Maze.

encounters.hazard: Sharp coral edges that inflict minor damage on collision

pickup.name: Rainbow Scale
pickup.effect: Blinds nearby enemies with brilliant colors

encounters.trigger: Taming the crab causes it to pinch open a rusted latch leading to the Abyssal Grotto.

encounters.hazard: Eel-filled crevices that shock the player if they stand too close

pickup.name: Throne Room Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the final arena

encounters.trigger: The shark drops a golden key that unlocks the entrance to the Sunken Palace throne room.

boss.name: The Melodious Kraken
boss.victory_condition: Use the key to jam the Kraken's singing tentacles.

level.objective: Retrieve the Lost Melody Pearl from the depths.
level.reward: The Lost Melody Pearl which grants the power of song-based illusion.

level.setting: An ancient, labyrinthine jungle plagued by chaotic magical distortions.

encounters.hazard: Toxic pollen clouds that drain health periodically.

pickup.name: Heavy Vine-Cutter
pickup.effect: Deals bonus damage to thick foliage and root-bound creatures.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the viper unlocks the main vine gate to the marsh.

encounters.hazard: Sinking mud patches that slow movement speed.

pickup.name: Spirit-Flame Torch
pickup.effect: Ignites dense vegetation and terrifies woodland predators.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the jaguar allows the player to reach the ancient monolith.

encounters.hazard: Falling massive branches from the canopy above.

pickup.name: Sun-Touched Amulet
pickup.effect: Weakens the core of ancient nature entities.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the sentinel shatters the seal to the forbidden canopy throne.

boss.name: Blighted Beast King
boss.victory_condition: Use the Sun-Touched Amulet to cleanse the king's spirit while dodging his rampaging attacks.

level.objective: Dethrone the corrupted beast deity ruling the jungle.
level.reward: Control over the jungle ecosystem and the title of Beast Sovereign.

level.setting: The lost ruins of Xylos, a dense jungle filled with ancient stone carvings.

pickup.name: Sunfire Amulet
pickup.effect: Grants radiant damage to arrows.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the stalker reveals a glowing stone pedestal.

pickup.name: Ancient Signal Flare
pickup.effect: Blinds enemies for 5 seconds.

encounters.trigger: Burning the roots clears the path to the inner temple.

pickup.name: Scepter of Echoes
pickup.effect: Summons a protective barrier.

encounters.trigger: Stunning the beast opens the heavy jade gate to the sanctum.

boss.name: Great Canopy Serpent
boss.victory_condition: Use the Scepter to shatter the serpent's scales then strike the heart.

level.objective: Retrieve the Jade Heart of the Jungle.
level.reward: The title of Verdant Warden and the artifact of eternal growth.

level.setting: An ancient, forbidden jungle temple choked by suffocating vegetation and shifting shadows

pickup.name: Sun-Dried Herb
pickup.effect: Restores stamina and dulls toxin effects

encounters.trigger: Defeating the stalker reveals a path to the inner sanctum

pickup.name: Ancient Resonator
pickup.effect: Emits a high-frequency pulse that shatters brittle stone

encounters.trigger: Sentinel collapse opens the heavy vine gate

encounters.hazard: Thick fog obscuring line of sight

pickup.name: Focus Totem
pickup.effect: Increases attack speed and critical hit chance

encounters.trigger: Shadow Jaguar death unlocks the central boss chamber

boss.name: Verdant Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Use the Ancient Resonator to shatter the Overlord's protective moss armor before striking the heart

level.objective: Retrieve the Jade Heart before the eclipse concludes
level.reward: The legendary Jade Heart and the title of Shadow Warden

level.setting: An ancient, tranquil jungle canopy filled with bioluminescent flora.

pickup.name: Ancient Sunstone
pickup.effect: Restores health and provides a warm light.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Strider clears the path to the Riverbank.

pickup.name: Ceremonial Bell
pickup.effect: Produces a resonant sound that shatters illusions.

encounters.trigger: Purifying the river unlocks the gate to the Sanctum.

encounters.hazard: Falling debris from the crumbling ceiling.

pickup.name: Jungle Heart Root
pickup.effect: Increases elemental resistance.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the stone shell reveals the inner sanctum.

boss.name: Great Canopy Spirit
boss.victory_condition: Use the root to calm the spirit and end the conflict.

level.objective: Restore balance to the Ancient Jungle Sanctum.
level.reward: The title of Guardian of the Glade.

level.setting: A decaying, lightless jungle canopy where the air tastes of sulfur and ancient magic.

encounters.hazard: Thick fog that drains 5 health every second.

pickup.name: Ancient Serpent Tooth
pickup.effect: Grants acidic damage bonus against stone and iron.

encounters.trigger: Opening the beast's ribcage reveals a ritual key needed for the altar path.

encounters.hazard: Poisonous dart traps triggered by movement.

pickup.name: Essence of the Damned
pickup.effect: Increases necrotic energy for the final ritual.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the golem causes the surrounding vines to retract, unveiling the entrance to the Forbidden Crypt.

encounters.hazard: Unstable floor panels that deal falling damage.

pickup.name: Void Amulet
pickup.effect: Nullifies the boss's aura of decay.

encounters.trigger: Shattering the spirit opens the seal to the inner sanctum where the boss awaits.

boss.name: Malakor the Undying
boss.victory_condition: Channel the Void Amulet to collapse his physical form while his health is below 20 percent.

level.objective: Exorcise the Ancient Blight from the jungle core.
level.reward: The Necromancer's Grimoire of Eternal Restoration.

level.setting: A vibrant, gravity-defying jungle where plants hum melodies.

pickup.name: Acid Vial
pickup.effect: Corrodes wooden shielding.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the golem reveals a path to the singing waterfall.

pickup.name: Explosive Catalyst
pickup.effect: Increases chemical reaction potency.

encounters.trigger: The toad's croak echoes, calling the guardian to the hollow tree.

pickup.name: Reflective Mirror Shard
pickup.effect: Blinds mechanical sensors.

encounters.trigger: The monkey drops a key that opens the gate to the Great Canopy.

boss.name: The Monochrome Monarch
boss.victory_condition: Use the mirror to bounce back the monarch's colorless beam while dealing damage with the staff.

level.objective: Restore the color to the Prism Jungle by defeating the colorless entity.

level.setting: An ancient, decaying jungle filled with ruins and temporal anomalies.

pickup.name: Stasis Sand
pickup.effect: Slows time-based entities.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the Stalker opens the path to the overgrown temple entrance.

pickup.name: Sun-Dial Gear
pickup.effect: Stabilizes temporal distortions.

encounters.trigger: Clearing the wraith triggers the mechanism to enter the inner sanctum.

pickup.name: Echo Crystal
pickup.effect: Repels chronological decay.

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the guardian reveals the boss altar.

boss.name: Void Serpent
boss.victory_condition: Use the Echo Crystal to destabilize the serpent's time-loop.

level.objective: Retrieve the Chronos Heart before the jungle consumes time itself.

level.setting: An abandoned, mist-covered jungle where nature has grown aggressive and necrotic.

pickup.name: Mana-Infused Root
pickup.effect: Increases damage against spirit-bound constructs.

encounters.trigger: Slaying the beast reveals a glowing mana-infused root.

pickup.name: Ancient Sun-Shard
pickup.effect: Burns foes that are immune to physical damage.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the construct causes the altar behind it to pulse with light.

pickup.name: Cursed Idol
pickup.effect: Deals massive damage to the final boss.

encounters.trigger: The Guardian vanishes, opening the heavy stone doors to the inner sanctum.

boss.name: Blight-King Kraul
boss.victory_condition: Reduce boss health to zero while surviving the ritual waves.

level.objective: Purify the defiled heart of the jungle.
